title: Sorcerer+
description: A very good optimization modpack and fill with more mods that make your Minecraft feel  and play way better.
body:
![Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9566be404226f6674c520ba2809e8c12ca695135_0.webp)



Sorcerer+ is based off of Sorcerer, it is a **optimization modpack** that adds a alot of mods to help your game run better. **I have been testing and trying out new mods** to see if they be useful and help my game and your game run better. Plus all of those optimization mods there is more like 3D Skin Layers, make outer skin layers look way better. e4mc, a mod lets people to join your lan from anywhere and even more!

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________


[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpE1o1HZGckA4d5HpLlw5NA) - [Discord](https://discord.gg/uN9e6f5MWn)


_____________________________________________________________________________________________________




### **Please go support the mods that are in this modpack (All of them down below).**


<details>
<summary>Mod</summary>

- Mod menu
- Noisium
- Text Placeholder API
- Entity Culling
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Fabric API
- Continuity
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- ImmediatelyFast
- Sodium
- Resourcify
- Zoomify
- More Culling
- e4mc
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
- Lithium
- TCDCommons API
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
- FerriteCore
- Iris Shaders
- Cloth Config API
- Mouse Tweaks
- 3D Skin Layers
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Blur+
- LambDynamicLights
- Particle Rain
- Better Statistics Screen
- More Chat History

--Resource packs--
- Low Fire
- Low Shield

</details>
